description: Float in comfort with the Comanche range of floaters from ADIDAS. Comfortable yet sturdy, these sandals are great for a stroll in the park or a walk on a trek trail.UpperNubuck and suede leather upper for maximum styleUpper with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners, providing a snug, customised FitForefoot straps with perforations for maximum breathabilityCollar strap with cushioned pad to prevent chaffing and formation of blistersCushioned inners for greater comfortAppliquéd logo on the ankle strap for styleMidsoleCushioned footbed with slightly elevated leopard pattern for soft massage feel and all-day comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater traction and impact guidance system to absorb shock on impact and distribute it along the soleFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetLugs to provide greater durabilityshoe careDo not wash or wear in wet conditionsUse a dirt brush to brush off the dirtUpperNubuck and suede leather upper for maximum styleUpper with forefoot and ankle straps, coupled with velcro fasteners, providing a snug, customised fitForefoot straps with perforations for maximum breathabilityCollar strap with cushioned pad to prevent chaffing and formation of blistersCushioned inners for greater comfortAppliquéd logo on the ankle strap for styleMidsoleCushioned footbed with slightly elevated leopard pattern for soft massage feel and all-day comfort OutsoleTPR outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater traction and impact guidance system to absorb shock on impact and distribute it along the soleFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetLugs to provide greater durabilityShoe careDo not wash or wear in wet conditionsUse a dirt brush to brush off the dirt
